title: Real-site enablement: opt-in real tier, selector discovery, UC1-3 real acceptance (D-002)
supersedes: the prior manager-1 PARTIAL/logged-out handoff (same path); B1 'logged out' is REFUTED — see blocker B2.
headline: T1 (tier plumbing) DONE+committed and unaffected. The automated real-site legs (T2 discovery, T3 acceptance) are INFEASIBLE as designed: chatgpt.com serves a Cloudflare 'Just a moment...' bot interstitial that NEVER clears for the Playwright-automated browser, so it cannot reach the app OR the login page. This is NOT an auth problem and NOT operator-sign-in-resolvable. Mission now needs an operator/team-lead DECISION (blocker B2). 0 of 30 real messages spent.

telemetry.ACTUAL: ~97m wall-clock elapsed (first manager start 2026-06-12T09:59:16 -> 2026-06-12T11:36:39), of which ~61m active manager work (manager-1 T1 leg ~35m + manager-2 resume ~26m) and ~36m idle (operator-engagement gap between manager lifetimes). Mission NOT complete — blocked, not finished.
telemetry.MESSAGES_USED_note: 0 across BOTH ledgers (tmp/real-audit-20260612T100518/messages.log = 0 lines; tmp/real-audit-20260612T111042/messages.log = 0 lines). Budget 30/30 intact. All 3 resume probes were pure page-render observation (zero prompts to ChatGPT).
telemetry.REWORK-CAUSE_detail: The mission spec made real-site discovery/acceptance AGENT-DRIVEN, but ground truth (Cloudflare bot-block) makes that infeasible and it conflicts with the team charter's own anchor: 'Real-chatgpt.com proof is operator-run from runbooks, never automated.' Not env-drift (display/profile/version all fine) and not frozen-file/dependency-rot.

telemetry_lines: ACTUAL: M-006 ~97m elapsed (~61m active), PARTIAL — blocked on Cloudflare (B2), not complete
REWORK-CAUSE: spec-gap (agent-driven real-site infeasible vs Cloudflare; conflicts with charter 'real proof is operator-run')
what_was_verified: Startup sibling-safety: recorded manager-1 pid 3288281 DEAD and duplicate 3286529 DEAD via kill -0 -> no live sibling; recorded my pid 3390129 in M-006-state.json (manager_lifetimes[1] + top-level manager_pid).
Budget from ground truth: counted 0 data lines in both audit ledgers -> spent=0, remaining=30. Created the resume ledger tmp/real-audit-20260612T111042/messages.log.
Env preflight: chromium NOT running, no SingletonLock (profile unlocked), DISPLAY=:0 + ~/.Xauthority present, profile dirs Default/Profile 1/System Profile present.

Cloudflare block confirmed by THREE independent zero-message render probes: v1 (3s) inconsistent; v2 (20s robust, both Profile 1 + Default) -> no composer/login/signup/history/account chrome, title 16 chars != 'ChatGPT'; v3 (45s confirm) -> title 'Just a moment...' continuously sec2->44 on chatgpt.com, composer=0 login_ctl=0 throughout. INTERSTITIAL_CONFIRMED: cloudflare, CLEARED_TO_APP_OR_LOGIN: no.
Default-tier purity intact: src/ask_chatgpt/selector_maps/real.json still 0 non-empty selectors (untouched); no git changes to it.
Safety honored: no login automated, no profile contents/cookies/tokens read, no account identifiers captured, NO bot-detection bypass attempted (explicitly forbidden the probe workers).

artifacts.desc: Authoritative manager-2 finding + evidence table + decision options
The 3 zero-message probe reports (v3 has the 45s Cloudflare timeline)
The 3 self-contained probe contracts (SAFETY BLOCK verbatim; diagnose-only, no-bypass)
Tier plumbing: real_site marker + addopts deselection + ASK_CHATGPT_REAL double-gate + real_allowlist + ProfileLockedError/preflight + executable_path; mock suite 132 passed/1 deselected
artifacts.trust: manager-gate-verified; INDEPENDENT best-of-N verification still PENDING

blocker.condition: chatgpt.com Cloudflare 'Just a moment...' bot interstitial blocks the Playwright-automated headed Chromium (system binary + operator's real profile); persists 45s, never clears to app or login. The automated browser cannot reach chatgpt.com's app OR auth layer.
blocker.why_agent_cannot_resolve: Not auth (operator's own human browser is signed in and passes Cloudflare; automation just can't reach auth, so 'sign in again' does nothing). Passing Cloudflare needs bot-detection evasion = outward-facing + not authorized under D-002 + plausible OpenAI ToS risk for the operator account + disallowed by charter. Agent did NOT attempt it.

decision_options.A_DEFAULT_recommended: Revert real-site proof to OPERATOR-RUN runbooks (matches the charter anchor 'Real-chatgpt.com proof is operator-run from runbooks, never automated'). Mock tier (132 passing) is the authoritative automated acceptance. T1 stands as the delivered automated artifact; real.json stays empty/fail-closed. Operator resolves the 10 unknowns + UC1-3 from docs/runbooks/observe-chatgpt-unknowns.md and docs/runbooks/real-site-acceptance.md.
decision_options.B_optional_CDP_attach: Operator launches their OWN signed-in Chromium with --remote-debugging-port=9222 (passes Cloudflare as a real human browser); a worker connect_over_cdp()s to that human session instead of launch_persistent_context. NOT bot-evasion (drives a genuine human browser) but needs operator consent + the debug-port launch, may re-challenge on navigation, and is more complex. A fresh manager would author CDP-attach variants of T2/T3 under the SAME SAFETY BLOCK + 30-msg budget.
decision_options.C_not_recommended: Stealth/anti-detection to pass Cloudflare — flagged for completeness; do NOT pursue without explicit operator sign-off owning the ToS/charter risk.

blocker.exact_next_step: Team lead relays B2 to the operator; operator picks A, B, or C and notifies the lead. Default (A) needs no real-site automation — only an optional T1 independent verification + a mission closeout.

recommended_next_tasks.task: T1 independent best-of-N verification (mock-only, non-real, UNBLOCKED NOW)
recommended_next_tasks.detail: The one remaining automated task that is NOT blocked by Cloudflare. N=3 distinct lenses (correctness of the double-gate/addopts deselection; allowlist + preflight conformance; default-tier purity = clean `uv run pytest` collects zero real_site + socket guard intact) over ONE authoritative suite run, + synthesis. Raises T1 from manager-gate-verified to independently-verified. Do this under option A, or fold into the final T4 under option B.
recommended_next_tasks.parallelism: the 3 lenses run in parallel over one shared pytest output (do NOT have 3 workers each re-run the heavy suite concurrently).

recommended_next_tasks.task: If option A: close M-006 for automated scope
recommended_next_tasks.detail: Mark T2/T3 INFEASIBLE-BY-CLOUDFLARE (delegated to operator/runbooks), keep T1 as the delivered artifact, update VERIFICATION.md real-site section honestly (mock-proven; real proof = operator-run, automation infeasible due to Cloudflare), closeout commit.

recommended_next_tasks.task: If option B: author CDP-attach T2/T3
recommended_next_tasks.detail: connect_over_cdp() to the operator's --remote-debugging-port browser; same 10-unknown discovery + UC1-3 acceptance, same 30-msg HARD budget + ledger + audit + headed/serialized/login-never-automated rules; then T2b install + T4 panel as originally planned.

complexity_paradigm_signals: PARADIGM: the 'agent-driven real-site' design is falsified by Cloudflare and conflicts with the charter's own ground-truth anchor (real proof is operator-run). The simplest correct design is to honor the anchor: mock = authoritative automated acceptance, real = operator-run. Recommend the team lead/operator update D-002 / the mission model to reflect that automated chatgpt.com browser-driving is infeasible without evasion.

The prior manager's 'logged out' BLOCKER (B1) was a MISDIAGNOSIS of the same Cloudflare interstitial (or a transient pre-challenge state). Lesson: a single 3s render probe with narrow markers is not enough to diagnose a real-site block; the title 'Just a moment...' + a poll-to-clear test is the reliable discriminator. Captured as agent memory for future managers.
resume_ready_state_pointer: orchestration/state/M-006-state.json (status PARTIAL_BLOCKED_CLOUDFLARE; B2 active; B1 refuted; budget 0/30; manager_pid 3390129). Do NOT re-run the B1 logged-out path. A fresh manager: re-read this handoff + state, recompute budget from BOTH ledgers (still 0), and proceed by the operator's B2 decision.
